description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:20.0 Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt, install g++-4.9 and set CXX to g++-4.9. Define a single test job in the default test stage that executes `make test` then `make test cover`. Cache the directories `_build/default/lib/rocksdb` and `_build/test/lib/rocksdb`. Collect artifacts from `_build/test/logs` and `_build/test/cover` and always upload them. No additional services or branch/tag rules are required.
